---
id: update-room-attributes
title: "ModifyRoomAttribute"
description: "根据房间 ID 更新自定义的房间属性。一个房间最多可设置 20 个房间属性，如果需要增加房间属性数量上限，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。"
api: 
info_path: core_products/zim/zh/docs_zim_server_zh/room/open-api-desc
date: "2026-07-08"
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>ModifyRoomAttribute</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"post"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


根据房间 ID 更新自定义的房间属性。一个房间最多可设置 20 个房间属性，如果需要增加房间属性数量上限，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。

房间属性更新后，可以通过以下 ZIM SDK 的回调接口，接收房间属性更新的通知。
| iOS-25% | Android-25% | macOS-25% |Windows-25% |
|-----|---------|-------|-------|
|[roomAttributesUpdated](/zim-ios/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimroomattributesupdatedroomid-zimeventhandler)|[onRoomAttributesUpdated](/zim-android/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onroomattributesupdated-zimeventhandler)|[roomAttributesUpdated](/zim-macos/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimroomattributesupdatedroomid-zimeventhandler)|[onRoomAttributesUpdated](/zim-win/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onroomattributesupdated-zimeventhandler)|

| Web-25% | 小程序-25% |Flutter-25% | React Native-25% |
|---------|-----|--------|---------|
|[onRoomAttributesUpdated](/zim-web/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onroomattributesupdated-zimeventhandler)|[onRoomAttributesUpdated](/zim-miniprogram/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onroomattributesupdated-zimeventhandler)|[onRoomAttributesUpdated](/zim-flutter/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onroomattributesupdated-zimeventhandler)|[onRoomAttributesUpdated](/zim-rn/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onroomattributesupdated-zimeventhandler)|

| Unity3D-25% | uni-app \| uni-app x-25% | HarmonyOS-25% |
|--------------|---------|---------|
|[OnRoomAttributesUpdated](/zim-u3d/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onroomattributesupdated-zimeventhandler)|[roomAttributesUpdated](/zim-uniapp-x/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#roomattributesupdated-zimeventhandler)|[roomAttributesUpdated](/zim-harmonyos/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#roomattributesupdated-zimeventhandler)|

 <Note title="说明">调用频率限制：20 次/秒。</Note>

## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","description":"> 接口原型参数\n>\n> https://zim-api.zego.im/?Action=ModifyRoomAttribute\n","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["ModifyRoomAttribute"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。应用 Id，由 ZEGO 分配的用户唯一凭证。可从 <a target=\"_blank\" href=\"https://console.zego.im/\">ZEGO 控制台</a> 获取。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。16 位 16 进制随机字符串（8 字节随机数的 hex 编码）。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。当前 Unix 时间戳，单位为秒。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>，最多允许 10 分钟的误差。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名版本号。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名，用于验证请求的合法性。请参考[签名机制](/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism)生成。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>
<MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime request"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json-schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details mime"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-mime"}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-body"}>Body</h3><strong className={"openapi-schema__required"}>required</strong></summary><ul className={"request-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"FromUserId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 32 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"操作者，需要是已注册状态，该用户不会自动加入房间。仅支持数字，英文字符和 '!'，'#'，'$'，'%'，'&'，'('，')'，'+'，'-'，':'，';'，'<'，'='，'.'，'>'，'?'，'@'，'['，']'，'^'，'_'，' '，'，'，'","maxLength":32,"example":"fromUserId"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"RoomId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 32 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"房间 ID。仅支持数字，英文字符和 '!'，'#'，'$'，'%'，'&'，'('，')'，'+'，'-'，':'，';'，'<'，'='，'.'，'>'，'?'，'@'，'['，']'，'^'，'_'，'，'，'","maxLength":32,"example":"room123"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>Attributes</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object[]</span><span className={"openapi-schema__divider"}></span><span className={"openapi-schema__required"}>required</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>要更新的房间属性信息。</div><li className={"opening-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"opening-array-bracket"}><span className={"opening-array-bracket_text"}>Array</span><span className={"opening-array-bracket_symbol"}>[</span></div></li><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Action"} required={true} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** [`0`, `1`]"} schema={{"type":"number","description":"删除还是设置，0 设置，1 删除。","enum":[0,1]}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Key"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"房间属性 key。\n\n> **说明**\n>\n> 如果传递的 Key 已经存在，则会修改已有的属性信息。\n","example":"attribute1"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Value"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"房间属性 value。","example":"value1"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"AutoDelete"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** [`0`, `1`]"} schema={{"type":"number","description":"用户退出时，是否自动删除，0：不自动删除，1：自动删除。如果 FromUserId 不在房间内，则会在其先进入房间后，然后再退出时触发删除操作。","enum":[0,1],"example":1}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"StopOnError"} required={false} schemaName={"integer"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** [`0`, `1`]"} schema={{"type":"integer","description":"是否开启快速失败，默认为关闭。\n- 0: 关闭快速失败。执行遇到错误时，记录当前属性并继续执行后续的更新操作，执行结束后返回所有记录到的属性。\n- 1: 开启快速失败。执行遇到错误时，停止更新操作并返回本次更新的属性，已执行成功的更新操作会保留。\n","enum":[0,1]}}></SchemaItem><li className={"closing-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"closing-array-bracket"}>]</div></li></div></details></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem></MimeTabs>
<div><div><ApiTabs label={undefined} id={undefined}><TabItem label={"200"} value={"200"}><div>OK</div><div><MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime"} schemaType={"response"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json"}><SchemaTabs className={"openapi-tabs__schema"}><TabItem label={"Schema"} value={"Schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details response"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-response"}><strong>Schema</strong></summary><ul className={"response-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Code"} required={false} schemaName={"integer"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"integer","description":"返回状态码（0 表示成功）。\n\n以下仅列出了接口业务逻辑相关的 Code 和 SubCode ，完整返回码请参考 [全局返回码](/zim-server/return-codes)。\n<table>\n<thead><tr><th>Code / SubCode</th><th>说明</th><th>解决方案</th></tr></thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr><td>660000002</td><td>参数错误。</td><td>请检查参数。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660300005</td><td>频率限制。</td><td>请稍后再尝试。</td></tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Message"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"返回状态信息。","example":"success"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"RequestId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"请求唯一标识。","example":"req-123456789"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"AttributeSeq"} required={false} schemaName={"int32"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"int32","description":"记录房间内所有属性（创建、修改、删除）的总变更次数，用于校准属性和计算属性变更顺序，每有一个属性发生变化时 AttributeSeq 值 + 1。\n> 注意： 当一次有多个属性变更时，AttributeSeq 值会增加多次。例如，一次修改了 3 个属性，则 AttributeSeq 值会增加 3。\n","example":3}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>SuccKeyList</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object[]</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>成功的 key 列表（仅成功时返回）</div><li className={"opening-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"opening-array-bracket"}><span className={"opening-array-bracket_text"}>Array</span><span className={"opening-array-bracket_symbol"}>[</span></div></li><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Key"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"修改成功的 key。","example":"key1"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Seq"} required={false} schemaName={"int32"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"int32","description":"房间属性 Key 的序列号，用于校准属性和计算属性变更顺序。每个属性在创建、修改成功时，Seq 值与当前的 AttributeSeq 相等。","example":3}}></SchemaItem><li className={"closing-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"closing-array-bracket"}>]</div></li></div></details></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>ErrKeyList</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object[]</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>错误的 key 列表（仅失败时返回）。</div><li className={"opening-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"opening-array-bracket"}><span className={"opening-array-bracket_text"}>Array</span><span className={"opening-array-bracket_symbol"}>[</span></div></li><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"SubCode"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number","description":"具体返回码。完整返回码请参考 Code 说明或者 [全局返回码](/zim-server/return-codes)。\n","example":1}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Key"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"出现错误的 key 值。","example":"attr1"}}></SchemaItem><li className={"closing-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"closing-array-bracket"}>]</div></li></div></details></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example (from schema)"} value={"Example (from schema)"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"req-123456789\",\n  \"AttributeSeq\": 3,\n  \"SuccKeyList\": [\n    {\n      \"Key\": \"key1\",\n      \"Seq\": 3\n    }\n  ],\n  \"ErrKeyList\": [\n    {\n      \"SubCode\": 1,\n      \"Key\": \"attr1\"\n    }\n  ]\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example"} value={"Example"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"req-123456789\",\n  \"AttributeSeq\": 3,\n  \"SuccKeyList\": [\n    {\n      \"Key\": \"key1\",\n      \"Seq\": 3\n    },\n    {\n      \"Key\": \"key2\",\n      \"Seq\": 2\n    }\n  ],\n  \"ErrKeyList\": [\n    {\n      \"SubCode\": 1,\n      \"Key\": \"attr1\"\n    },\n    {\n      \"SubCode\": 2,\n      \"Key\": \"attr2\"\n    }\n  ]\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem></SchemaTabs></TabItem></MimeTabs></div></TabItem></ApiTabs></div></div>
